title: Neural ODEs for Irregular Time Series
authors: Your Name, J. Smith, M. Zhang
abstract: We propose a continuous-depth framework to model irregularly sampled time series, achieving state-of-the-art on three healthcare benchmarks.

title: Efficient Attention via Low-Rank Projections
authors: Your Name, A. Gupta, L. Chen
abstract: This work introduces a new linear-time attention mechanism that approximates full attention with provable low-rank error bounds.
